name: player_season_projected_points single year_offset shifts the projection year
description: player_season_projected_points with year=[2023] + single year_offset=[1] correlates the projection join on year=2024 (base+1) via the shared emit_year_match primitive, returning the offset-year projection instead of silently returning the base-year value.
expected_query: select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, "t3bbf1d9c941eda2597574bd44af9f16e"."total" AS "season_projected_points_0", "player"."pos" from "player" left join "scoring_format_player_projection_points" as "t3bbf1d9c941eda2597574bd44af9f16e" on "t3bbf1d9c941eda2597574bd44af9f16e"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "t3bbf1d9c941eda2597574bd44af9f16e"."year" = 2024 and "t3bbf1d9c941eda2597574bd44af9f16e"."week" = '0' and "t3bbf1d9c941eda2597574bd44af9f16e"."scoring_format_id" = 'draftkings' group by player.fname, player.lname, "t3bbf1d9c941eda2597574bd44af9f16e"."total", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
